nasb.text: He made its posts of silver, Its back of gold And its seat of purple fabric, With its interior lovingly fitted out By the daughters of Jerusalem.

esv.text: He made its posts of silver, its back of gold, its seat of purple; its interior was inlaid with love by the daughters of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他用銀子做轎柱， 用金子做轎底， 用紫色料子做轎的座墊； 內部所鋪設的， 是耶路撒冷眾女子的愛情。

ccb.text: 银轿柱、金靠背、紫锦坐垫， 轿子里面的装饰都是耶路撒冷少女们用爱情编织的。
